items.speaker: Zhuxi
items.text: Where have the kittens gone? Can't find any lately. Days without fluffy foot pads are so grueling... lucky the puppies are here.

items.speaker: Yingqi
items.text: Dogs are not a "substitute" for cats.

items.speaker: Zhuxi
items.text: I know! I love them both!

items.speaker: Yingqi
items.text: Fine, as long as you're happy.
